memberdef.definition: typedef void(* SYN_Canvas_FlushFn) (const uint8_t *buf, size_t len, void *ctx)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const uint8_t *buf, size_t len, void *ctx)
memberdef.name: SYN_Canvas_FlushFn

briefdescription.para: Callback to push framebuffer bytes to display hardware.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c, uint8_t *buf, uint16_t w, uint16_t h, uint8_t bpp, SYN_Canvas_FlushFn flush, void *ctx)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_init

parameterdescription.para: Framebuffer (caller allocates: w*h/8 for 1bpp, w*h*2 for 16bpp).
Bits per pixel (1 for mono, 16 for RGB565).
Callback to push framebuf to display hardware.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_set_clip

briefdescription.para: Set the clip rectangle. Drawing is restricted to this region.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_reset_clip

briefdescription.para: Reset clip rectangle to the full display area.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c, const SYN_Font *font)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_set_font

parameterdescription.para: Font descriptor, or NULL for built-in 5×7.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_clear

briefdescription.para: Clear the entire framebuffer (fill with zero).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c, uint16_t color)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_fill

briefdescription.para: Fill the entire framebuffer with a color.

parameterdescription.para: Fill color (0/1 for mono, RGB565 for color).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c, int16_t x, int16_t y, uint16_t color)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_pixel

parameterdescription.para: Pixel color (0/1 for mono, RGB565 for color).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c, int16_t x0, int16_t y0, int16_t x1, int16_t y1, uint16_t color)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_line

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h, uint16_t color)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_rect

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h, uint16_t color)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_rect_fill

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c, int16_t cx, int16_t cy, int16_t r, uint16_t color)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_circle

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c, int16_t cx, int16_t cy, int16_t r, uint16_t color)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_circle_fill

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h, int16_t r, uint16_t color)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_rect_round

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, int16_t h, int16_t r, uint16_t color)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_rect_round_fill

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c, int16_t x, int16_t y, const uint8_t *bitmap, int16_t w, int16_t h, uint16_t color)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_bitmap

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c, int16_t x, int16_t y, const char *str, uint16_t color)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_text

briefdescription.para: Draw a text string at (x,y) using the active font.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c, int16_t x, int16_t y, char ch, uint16_t color)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_char

memberdef.argsstring: (const SYN_Canvas *c, const char *str)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_text_width

briefdescription.para: Measure text width in pixels (without drawing).

memberdef.argsstring: (const SYN_Canvas *c)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_text_height

briefdescription.para: Return the height of the active font in pixels.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t w, uint16_t color)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_hline

briefdescription.para: Draw a fast horizontal line (optimised; no Bresenham overhead).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c, int16_t x, int16_t y, int16_t h, uint16_t color)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_vline

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_flush

briefdescription.para: Push framebuffer to display via the flush callback.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Canvas *c, size_t offset, size_t len)
memberdef.name: syn_canvas_flush_partial

briefdescription.para: Push a slice of the framebuffer to the display.

detaileddescription.para: Calls the flush callback with a pointer into the framebuffer at offset with length len. Intended for coroutine-friendly incremental flushing — yield between chunks to avoid blocking the scheduler during slow SPI/I2C transfers.

parameterdescription.para: Byte offset into the framebuffer to start from.

simplesect.para: The display driver's flush_fn receives (framebuf+offset, len, ctx) — the same three-argument signature as a full flush. It must be written to handle sequential partial writes correctly (i.e. not re-issue a start-of-frame command before each chunk).

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b)
memberdef.name: syn_rgb565

briefdescription.para: Construct RGB565 color from 8-bit R, G, B components.

detaileddescription.para: Supports both monochrome (1bpp, e.g. SSD1306 OLED) and color (16bpp RGB565, e.g. ST7735 TFT) displays. The flush callback pushes the framebuffer to the actual hardware.
